subcodes.first_line: O faithful servant of the Ancient Beauty! Thy life is sustained by the Most Great Name, O sufferer in tribulations. Wherefore dost thou grieve?
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده پروفای جمال قدم زنده باسم اعظمی رنجور بلا را دیگر چه غمی امواج عطاء
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @consolation and comfort, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
